case_title: JOSE CORTEZ ET AL VS. ALEKSANDR PINKHASOV ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, JOSE CORTEZ, CORELIA RODRIGUEZ, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT PINKHASOV, ALEKSANDR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-02-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-09-2018
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-24-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-13-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-24-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62235544)
